bulbasaur.name: bulbasaur
bulbasaur.flavorText: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this POKéMON.

ivysaur.name: ivysaur
ivysaur.flavorText: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

venusaur.name: venusaur
venusaur.flavorText: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

charmander.name: charmander
charmander.flavorText: Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

charmeleon.name: charmeleon
charmeleon.flavorText: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.

charizard.name: charizard
charizard.flavorText: It is said that Charizard’s fire burns hotter if it has experienced harsh battles.

squirtle.name: squirtle
squirtle.flavorText: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

wartortle.name: wartortle
wartortle.flavorText: Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

blastoise.name: blastoise
blastoise.flavorText: A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles.

caterpie.name: caterpie
caterpie.flavorText: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

metapod.name: metapod
metapod.flavorText: This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

butterfree.name: butterfree
butterfree.flavorText: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

weedle.name: weedle
weedle.flavorText: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head.

kakuna.name: kakuna
kakuna.flavorText: Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

beedrill.name: beedrill
beedrill.flavorText: Flies at high speed and attacks using its large venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail.

pidgey.name: pidgey
pidgey.flavorText: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

pidgeotto.name: pidgeotto
pidgeotto.flavorText: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this POKéMON will fiercely peck at any intruder.

pidgeot.name: pidgeot
pidgeot.flavorText: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP.

rattata.name: rattata
rattata.flavorText: Living wherever there is food available, it ceaselessly scav­ enges for edibles the entire day.

raticate.name: raticate
raticate.flavorText: It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.

spearow.name: spearow
spearow.flavorText: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne.

fearow.name: fearow
fearow.flavorText: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.

ekans.name: ekans
ekans.flavorText: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole.

arbok.name: arbok
arbok.flavorText: It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area.

pikachu.name: pikachu
pikachu.flavorText: When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.

raichu.name: raichu
raichu.flavorText: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high voltage power.

sandshrew.name: sandshrew
sandshrew.flavorText: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

sandslash.name: sandslash
sandslash.flavorText: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.

nidoran-f.name: nidoran-f
nidoran-f.flavorText: Although small, its venomous barbs render this POKéMON dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

nidorina.name: nidorina
nidorina.flavorText: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.

nidoqueen.name: nidoqueen
nidoqueen.flavorText: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.

nidoran-m.name: nidoran-m
nidoran-m.flavorText: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.

nidorino.name: nidorino
nidorino.flavorText: An aggressive POKéMON that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

nidoking.name: nidoking
nidoking.flavorText: It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones.

clefairy.name: clefairy
clefairy.flavorText: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.

clefable.name: clefable
clefable.flavorText: A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

vulpix.name: vulpix
vulpix.flavorText: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

ninetales.name: ninetales
ninetales.flavorText: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.

jigglypuff.name: jigglypuff
jigglypuff.flavorText: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

wigglytuff.name: wigglytuff
wigglytuff.flavorText: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.

zubat.name: zubat
zubat.flavorText: It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echolocation to flit about in darkness.

golbat.name: golbat
golbat.flavorText: Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.

oddish.name: oddish
oddish.flavorText: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

gloom.name: gloom
gloom.flavorText: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

vileplume.name: vileplume
vileplume.flavorText: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

paras.name: paras
paras.flavorText: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw­ ing nutrients from the bug host.

parasect.name: parasect
parasect.flavorText: It stays mostly in dark, damp places, the preference not of the bug, but of the big mush­ rooms on its back.

venonat.name: venonat
venonat.flavorText: Its big eyes are actually clusters of tiny eyes. At night, its kind is drawn by light.

venomoth.name: venomoth
venomoth.flavorText: The dust-like scales covering its wings are color coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.

diglett.name: diglett
diglett.flavorText: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

dugtrio.name: dugtrio
dugtrio.flavorText: A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

meowth.name: meowth
meowth.flavorText: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

persian.name: persian
persian.flavorText: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

psyduck.name: psyduck
psyduck.flavorText: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKéMON will use psychokinetic powers.

golduck.name: golduck
golduck.flavorText: Often seen swim­ ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.

mankey.name: mankey
mankey.flavorText: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.

primeape.name: primeape
primeape.flavorText: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.

growlithe.name: growlithe
growlithe.flavorText: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

arcanine.name: arcanine
arcanine.flavorText: A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

poliwag.name: poliwag
poliwag.flavorText: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand.

poliwhirl.name: poliwhirl
poliwhirl.flavorText: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

poliwrath.name: poliwrath
poliwrath.flavorText: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

abra.name: abra
abra.flavorText: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety.

kadabra.name: kadabra
kadabra.flavorText: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.

alakazam.name: alakazam
alakazam.flavorText: Its brain can out­ perform a super­ computer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5,000.

machop.name: machop
machop.flavorText: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.

machoke.name: machoke
machoke.flavorText: It happily carries heavy cargo to toughen up. It willingly does hard work for people.

machamp.name: machamp
machamp.flavorText: Using its heavy muscles, it throws powerful punches that can send the victim clear over the horizon.

bellsprout.name: bellsprout
bellsprout.flavorText: A carnivorous POKéMON that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.

weepinbell.name: weepinbell
weepinbell.flavorText: A Pokémon that appears to be a plant. It captures unwary prey by dousing them with a toxic powder.

victreebel.name: victreebel
victreebel.flavorText: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

tentacool.name: tentacool
tentacool.flavorText: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.

tentacruel.name: tentacruel
tentacruel.flavorText: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.

geodude.name: geodude
geodude.flavorText: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

graveler.name: graveler
graveler.flavorText: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

golem.name: golem
golem.flavorText: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.

ponyta.name: ponyta
ponyta.flavorText: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.

rapidash.name: rapidash
rapidash.flavorText: Very competitive, this POKéMON will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

slowpoke.name: slowpoke
slowpoke.flavorText: It is always so absent-minded that it won't react, even if its flavorful tail is bitten.

slowbro.name: slowbro
slowbro.flavorText: The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.

magnemite.name: magnemite
magnemite.flavorText: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses THUNDER WAVE and similar moves.

magneton.name: magneton
magneton.flavorText: Formed by several MAGNEMITEs linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

farfetchd.name: farfetchd
farfetchd.flavorText: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. It is used much like a metal sword.

doduo.name: doduo
doduo.flavorText: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

dodrio.name: dodrio
dodrio.flavorText: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.

seel.name: seel
seel.flavorText: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.

dewgong.name: dewgong
dewgong.flavorText: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.

grimer.name: grimer
grimer.flavorText: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

muk.name: muk
muk.flavorText: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

shellder.name: shellder
shellder.flavorText: Its hard shell repels any kind of attack. It is vulnerable only when its shell is open.

cloyster.name: cloyster
cloyster.flavorText: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.

gastly.name: gastly
gastly.flavorText: Almost invisible, this gaseous POKéMON cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

haunter.name: haunter
haunter.flavorText: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from an­ other dimension.

gengar.name: gengar
gengar.flavorText: Under a full moon, this POKéMON likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

onix.name: onix
onix.flavorText: It burrows through the ground at a speed of 50 mph while feeding on large boulders.

drowzee.name: drowzee
drowzee.flavorText: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.

hypno.name: hypno
hypno.flavorText: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of PSI moves such as HYPNOSIS and CONFUSION.

krabby.name: krabby
krabby.flavorText: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.

kingler.name: kingler
kingler.flavorText: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, its huge size makes it unwieldy to use.

voltorb.name: voltorb
voltorb.flavorText: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a POKé BALL, they have zapped many people.

electrode.name: electrode
electrode.flavorText: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

exeggcute.name: exeggcute
exeggcute.flavorText: Using telepathy only they can receive, they always form a cluster of six EXEGGCUTE.

exeggutor.name: exeggutor
exeggutor.flavorText: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an EXEGGCUTE.

cubone.name: cubone
cubone.flavorText: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this POKéMON's real face.

marowak.name: marowak
marowak.flavorText: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

hitmonlee.name: hitmonlee
hitmonlee.flavorText: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.

hitmonchan.name: hitmonchan
hitmonchan.flavorText: The arm-twisting punches it throws pulverize even concrete. It rests after three minutes of fighting.

lickitung.name: lickitung
lickitung.flavorText: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.

koffing.name: koffing
koffing.flavorText: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

weezing.name: weezing
weezing.flavorText: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 KOFFINGs can fuse into a WEEZING over many years.

rhyhorn.name: rhyhorn
rhyhorn.flavorText: Its massive bones are 1000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock a trailer flying.

rhydon.name: rhydon
rhydon.flavorText: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.

chansey.name: chansey
chansey.flavorText: A rare and elusive POKéMON that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.

tangela.name: tangela
tangela.flavorText: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to sea­ weed. Its vines shake as it walks.

kangaskhan.name: kangaskhan
kangaskhan.flavorText: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is 3 years old.

horsea.name: horsea
horsea.flavorText: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.

seadra.name: seadra
seadra.flavorText: Capable of swim­ ming backwards by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.

goldeen.name: goldeen
goldeen.flavorText: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname of the Water Queen.

seaking.name: seaking
seaking.flavorText: In autumn, its body becomes more fatty in preparing to propose to a mate. It takes on beautiful colors.

staryu.name: staryu
staryu.flavorText: An enigmatic POKéMON that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle.

starmie.name: starmie
starmie.flavorText: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value the core as a gem.

mr-mime.name: mr-mime
mr-mime.flavorText: If interrupted while it is miming, it will slap around the offender with its broad hands.
mr-mime.evolutionNote: Evolution: Mime Jr → Mr Mime → Mr Rime.

scyther.name: scyther
scyther.flavorText: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.

jynx.name: jynx
jynx.flavorText: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

electabuzz.name: electabuzz
electabuzz.flavorText: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

magmar.name: magmar
magmar.flavorText: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

pinsir.name: pinsir
pinsir.flavorText: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing it around and toss it hard.

tauros.name: tauros
tauros.flavorText: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

magikarp.name: magikarp
magikarp.flavorText: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

gyarados.name: gyarados
gyarados.flavorText: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

lapras.name: lapras
lapras.flavorText: A POKéMON that has been over­ hunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.

ditto.name: ditto
ditto.flavorText: When it spots an enemy, its body transfigures into an almost-perfect copy of its opponent.

eevee.name: eevee
eevee.flavorText: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from element STONEs.
eevee.evolutionNote: Evolution: Eevee → Vaporeon → Jolteon → Flareon → Espeon → Umbreon → Leafeon → Glaceon → Sylveon.

vaporeon.name: vaporeon
vaporeon.flavorText: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin which is often mistaken for a mermaid's.
vaporeon.evolutionNote: Evolution: Eevee → Vaporeon → Jolteon → Flareon → Espeon → Umbreon → Leafeon → Glaceon → Sylveon.

jolteon.name: jolteon
jolteon.flavorText: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000- volt lightning bolts.
jolteon.evolutionNote: Evolution: Eevee → Vaporeon → Jolteon → Flareon → Espeon → Umbreon → Leafeon → Glaceon → Sylveon.

flareon.name: flareon
flareon.flavorText: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.
flareon.evolutionNote: Evolution: Eevee → Vaporeon → Jolteon → Flareon → Espeon → Umbreon → Leafeon → Glaceon → Sylveon.

porygon.name: porygon
porygon.flavorText: A POKéMON that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

omanyte.name: omanyte
omanyte.flavorText: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.

omastar.name: omastar
omastar.flavorText: A prehistoric POKéMON that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible to catch prey.

kabuto.name: kabuto
kabuto.flavorText: A POKéMON that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

kabutops.name: kabutops
kabutops.flavorText: Kabutops slices its prey apart and sucks out the fluids. The discarded body parts become food for other Pokémon.

aerodactyl.name: aerodactyl
aerodactyl.flavorText: A ferocious, pre­ historic POKéMON that goes for the enemy's throat with its serrated saw-like fangs.

snorlax.name: snorlax
snorlax.flavorText: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

articuno.name: articuno
articuno.flavorText: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

zapdos.name: zapdos
zapdos.flavorText: A legendary bird POKéMON that is said to appear from clouds while dropping enormous lightning bolts.

moltres.name: moltres
moltres.flavorText: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

dratini.name: dratini
dratini.flavorText: Long considered a mythical POKéMON until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.

dragonair.name: dragonair
dragonair.flavorText: A mystical POKéMON that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

dragonite.name: dragonite
dragonite.flavorText: An extremely rarely seen marine POKéMON. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

mewtwo.name: mewtwo
mewtwo.flavorText: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

mew.name: mew
mew.flavorText: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.
